description:
Designed for intermediate developers, this quiz evaluates proficiency in JavaScript's number parsing and conversion functions, emphasizing their distinct behaviors, edge cases, and array method compatibility. It employs a clear, comparative teaching tone that uses structured reference tables to highlight practical differences. The assessment reinforces accurate type coercion and radix handling for real-world coding scenarios.
Topics: JavaScript type conversion, parseInt vs parseFloat, Number constructor, BigInt handling, Radix arguments, Invalid input edge cases
Audience: Intermediate JavaScript developers and frontend engineers
